meta.title: Voice API — Solvefy/CPaaS
meta.description: Solvefy/CPaaS Voice API: mass calls, programmable IVR and voice broadcast with answered-call billing. Humanized voice that converts at scale.

hero.title: Voice communication that <accent>connects at scale</accent>
hero.subtitle: Trigger thousands of calls in minutes with humanized audio, programmable IVR and billing only for answered calls. The presence of voice, with the predictability of an API.

benefits.title: Engagement only <accent>voice can deliver</accent>.
benefits.subtitle: Three levers that make voice perform where text gets saturated.

combine.title: Voice + SMS in the same flow
combine.desc: Combine voice broadcast and SMS in the same journey. Activate the right channel at the right time without switching tools.

billing.title: Pay only for what's answered
billing.desc: Billing per effectively answered call. Voicemail, busy or no-answer don't count.

audio.title: Humanized audio
audio.desc: Upload professional voiceovers or use influencer voices to increase attention and listen-through rates.

steps.title: From the first call to <accent>Enterprise volume</accent>, in 3 steps.

login.title: 1. Log into the platform
login.desc: Login in seconds. No install, no setup.

build.title: 2. Build the journey
build.desc: Choose the voice channel, upload the audio and segment your audience.

send.title: 3. Send or schedule
send.desc: Immediate sending or scheduled by date, time and operating window.

useCases.title: Voice that <accent>moves whole industries</accent>.
useCases.subtitle: Four fronts where Solvefy Voice already operates at volume.

betting.desc: Amplify odds offers and welcomes with short audios and recognizable voices — high engagement in real time.

credit.desc: Promote pre-approved offers combining explanatory audio and SMS with a signup link in the same journey.

collection.desc: Reduce delinquency with humanized reminders before the due date and post-overdue notices, with configurable cadence.

health.desc: Reduce no-shows by confirming appointments by voice with the option to reschedule via tone (DTMF).

api.title: Voice inside your <accent>system</accent>.
api.subtitle: Integrate voice broadcast, IVR and callbacks directly into your software. Clear documentation, SDKs and human support to get the first callback off the ground.

items.audio: Audio uploads or dynamic TTS per variable

faq.title: Frequently asked questions about Voice
faq.description: Everything that tends to come up before the first broadcast.

q1.question: What is the Solvefy/CPaaS Voice channel?
q1.answer: It's the voice API that triggers mass calls with pre-recorded audio (voice broadcast) or interactive calls with IVR. It allows you to reach large volumes in minutes, with per-contact personalization and real-time delivery reports.

q2.question: Can I personalize the message for each recipient?
q2.answer: Yes. Use variables (name, contract number, amount, due date, etc.) in the script or in dynamic voiceovers so each call arrives contextualized — without recording one audio per person.

q3.question: What's the difference between Voice and other channels (SMS, WhatsApp)?
q3.answer: Voice delivers presence and tone — useful when the human impact of speech converts more than text. On top of that, billing per answered call brings predictability. Voice combines well with SMS/WhatsApp for message reinforcement.

q4.question: What's the reach rate of a voice campaign?
q4.answer: On qualified databases, answer rates reach around 80%. Results depend on mailing quality, time of dispatch, audience profile and voiceover. Our team helps calibrate campaigns.

q5.question: Is it hard to operate? Do I need a technical team?
q5.answer: No. The interface is built for marketing, collections and relationship teams to operate directly. For automated flows from your system, REST API integration is available.

q6.question: Is there human support?
q6.answer: Yes. Human support in Portuguese and English, with real SLAs for critical operations. Dedicated follow-up for Enterprise clients.
